data.name: caja
data.code: arrange([8, silence], [16, s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~ sd ~").bank("LinnDrum").gain(0.7).room(0.3)], [8, s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~ sd ~").bank("LinnDrum").gain(0.6).room(0.4)], [8, s("~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~ sd ~").bank("LinnDrum").gain(0.72).room(0.3)])

data.name: toms
data.code: arrange([8, silence], [16, s("~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ lt mt").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.5).room(0.25)], [8, s("lt ~ mt ~ lt mt ht ~").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.5).room(0.3)], [8, s("~ ~ ~ ~ ~ ~ lt mt").bank("RolandTR808").gain(0.5).room(0.25)])

data.name: bajo
data.code: arrange([8, note("e2 e2 b2 e2 g2 e2 d3 b2").s("sawtooth").lpf(1300).lpq(2).decay(0.3).sustain(0.4).gain(0.5)], [16, note("e2 e2 b2 e2 g2 e2 d3 b2").s("sawtooth").lpf(1500).lpq(2).decay(0.3).sustain(0.45).gain(0.55)], [8, note("c2 c2 g2 c2 e2 c2 b2 g2").s("sawtooth").lpf(1400).lpq(2).sustain(0.45).gain(0.5)], [8, note("e2 e2 b2 e2 g2 e2 d3 b2").s("sawtooth").lpf(1500).lpq(2).sustain(0.45).gain(0.55)])._scope()

data.name: guitarra
data.code: arrange([8, silence], [16, note("e4 b4 g4 b4 e5 b4 g4 b4").s("triangle").lpf(3000).decay(0.2).sustain(0.1).phaser(0.4).delay(0.3).room(0.25).gain(0.38)], [8, note("c4 g4 e4 g4 c5 g4 e4 g4").s("triangle").lpf(2600).phaser(0.4).delay(0.35).room(0.35).gain(0.36)], [8, note("e4 b4 g4 b4 e5 b4 g4 b4").s("triangle").lpf(3000).phaser(0.4).delay(0.3).room(0.25).gain(0.4)])._pianoroll()
